update_instruction: Make the prompt more empathetic. Add an explicit escalation path to a human supervisor after 3 failed resolution attempts. Include an option to offer a callback or schedule a follow-up call. Add guidance for handling upset or angry customers.

test_cases.description: Prompt includes an escalation path to a human agent or supervisor
Prompt includes option to offer a callback or follow-up call
Prompt provides guidance for handling upset or angry customers
